hyperedges.label: Health sync request -> controller -> publisher -> Kafka topic
Spring bean wiring: ProducerFactory -> KafkaTemplate -> publisher
All k8s workloads collocated in vitalsync namespace
Kafka runtime: backend producer + Redpanda console UI -> kafka broker svc
HealthSnapshot data model spans DTOs, API spec, DB tables
